name: Winston Lin
title: Product across AI, platforms, and business systems
tagline: AI workflows, cloud platforms, and business systems.
meta_description: Winston Lin writes about AI workflows, software platforms, infrastructure, and business systems, with work spanning OCI Functions, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and operator-led growth.
intro_paragraphs: I’ve led product across CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless, and I also work with operators on growth, service design, and business systems.
experience_highlights: Principal Product Manager for OCI Functions, focused on developer experience and execution model
Previously led product work across OCI Kubernetes Engine and OCI DevOps / CI/CD
Built internal platform capabilities that shortened delivery cycles and reduced operational drag
